feat(icoder): add BusyIndicator widget with spinner (#766)

## Summary
Adds a BusyIndicator widget to the iCoder TUI that shows a spinner
animation with elapsed time while the LLM is processing, and displays
the current tool name during tool use.

## Changes
- Add `BusyIndicator` widget with spinner frames, elapsed timer, and
ready/busy states
- Wire `BusyIndicator` into `app.py` compose layout and stream event
handling
- Show "Thinking..." on text chunks, tool display name on tool start, "✓
Ready" on stream done
- Reset indicator to ready state on stream error via
`_reset_busy_indicator`
- Add CSS styling for the new widget
- Add unit tests for `BusyIndicator` widget behavior
- Add integration tests for startup, post-stream, tool display, and
error reset
- Regenerate all 9 SVG snapshot baselines to include the new widget row

commit.message:
feat: Yeaft Unify Phase 0 — infrastructure skeleton

Create agent/unify/ directory with core infrastructure:

- init.js: ~/.yeaft/ directory structure initialization
- config.js: Multi-source config (ENV > config.md > defaults)
- debug-trace.js: SQLite debug trace (3 tables, CRUD, query, stats)
- llm/adapter.js: LLM adapter base class, unified types, error types, factory
- llm/anthropic.js: Anthropic Messages API adapter with SSE streaming
- llm/chat-completions.js: Chat Completions adapter (GPT, DeepSeek, CopilotProxy)
- cli.js: CLI with --dry-run, --trace, -i REPL, / commands
- index.js: Module re-exports

Design decisions:
- Two adapters only (Anthropic + Chat Completions), no Responses API
- Unified event stream: text_delta, thinking_delta, tool_call, usage, stop, error
- Typed errors: RateLimitError, AuthError, ContextError, ServerError, AbortError
- Config: fallbackModel, maxContextTokens pre-allocated for Phase 1-2

50 tests added, all 1387 tests pass.

commit.message:
fix: 3D fill 노드 연동 버그 3건 + i18n 컴포넌트 전체 적용

【3D Fill 버그 수정】
- graph.js: addNode()에 areaSize 파라미터 추가 → _areaSize 저장
  (기존: 항상 undefined → fill 계산이 기본값 400mm²로만 동작하던 버그)
- nodes.js: refreshFillColors(graphNodes) 신규 메서드 추가
  (0~60%: 초록, 60~80%: 노랑, 80%+: 빨강 — 3D 메시 재질 즉시 갱신)
- app.js: 라우팅 완료/초기화 후 refreshFillColors() 호출 추가

Fill 데이터 흐름:
  SEcMS NodeData.areaSize → postMessage → graph.addNode._areaSize
  → routeAllCables → applyFillRatios → refreshFillColors → 3D 색상

【i18n 컴포넌트 적용】
- LoginScreen.tsx: useT() + 모든 한글 텍스트 t() 키 적용
- AdminPanel.tsx: useT() + 권한/상태/버튼 라벨 t() 적용
- ProjectSelectionScreen.tsx: useT() + 프로젝트/그룹 텍스트 t() 적용
- DashboardTab.tsx: useT() + 통계 라벨 t() 적용
- AnalysisTab.tsx: useT() + 분석 섹션 라벨 t() 적용
- RoutingTab.tsx: useT() + 라우팅 버튼/결과 텍스트 t() 적용
- TrayFillTab.tsx: useT() + 채움률 분석 텍스트 t() 적용
- cable-converter.html: data-i18n 속성 + KO/EN 전환 버튼 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Disable polling during RUN_HUBSPOT_IMPORT to prevent race conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Shift+Arrow key selection to terminal (#12)

* Add Shift+Arrow key selection to terminal (#12)

Intercepts Shift+Arrow keys in the custom key handler to extend the
terminal text selection, rather than forwarding them to the PTY. Tracks
an anchor (fixed) and active (moving) end; initialises from the existing
mouse selection or cursor position on first use. Resets state via
onSelectionChange when selection is cleared externally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review feedback on Shift+Arrow selection (#12)

- Reset selectionAnchor/Active/isUpdatingSelection in teardownTerminal
  to prevent stale state carrying over across terminal relaunches
- Clamp active row to buffer.length - 1 when pressing Shift+Down
- Add comment explaining isUpdatingSelection synchrony assumption
- Implement anchor flip when active crosses the anchor, mirroring
  standard editor behaviour for reversing selection direction
- Replace unreliable mouseup-based drag-direction detection with a
  proximity comparison: record the mousedown pixel position and on
  first Shift+Arrow use getBoundingClientRect to convert it to a
  terminal cell, then anchor whichever selection end is closest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* WIP. Almost fixed anchor positioning for single character highlighting

* Fix drag selection anchor by capturing direction at selection-change time (#12)

Replace pixel-distance and mouseup-based approaches with a mousemove
tracker that determines drag direction at the moment onSelectionChange
fires. This is immune to post-drag mouse parking and works reliably for
all selection sizes including single-character selections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review feedback on drag selection (#12)

- Guard onDragMouseMove with dragOriginPixel check to avoid per-event
  allocation when no drag is in progress
- Make teardown of onDragMouseDown explicit for consistency with
  onDragMouseMove
- Rename dragStartPixel to dragOriginPixel for clarity
- Add clarifying comment for the anchor-flip XOR condition
- Let Shift+Arrow pass through to the PTY when no selection exists, so
  the shell cursor still moves; keep the inverse-selection flow intact
- Filter onDragMouseDown on e.button === 0 so right/middle clicks don't
  stomp the drag origin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Restore pre-flip anchor on zero-crossing (#12)

When Shift+Arrow caused the active end to cross the anchor, the anchor
was moved to the old active position — but the original anchor was
lost. Reversing direction back through the new anchor then collapsed
the selection to zero instead of restoring the pre-flip state.

Save the pre-flip anchor so that when the active position returns to
the current anchor, we can restore the original selection — matching
the "shift+up then shift+down returns to the original" behaviour in
most editors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review comments and split key handler (#12)

- Clarify initSelectionEndpoints comment about absolute buffer coords
- Document intentional column preservation on Shift+Up/Down
- Promote zero-crossing restore to the main comment block and note
  selectionPreviousAnchor lifetime for future maintainers
- Split onClipboardKey into a thin dispatcher (onTerminalKey) that
  delegates to handleShiftArrowKey and handleClipboardKey sub-handlers.
  Reduces cognitive complexity and gives Shift+Arrow its own clearly
  scoped handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clear selection on terminal resize (#12)

xterm reflows the buffer on resize, which invalidates the row/col
coordinates stored in selectionAnchor/selectionActive. Clear the
selection on resize so stale positions can't point at unintended
characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Daniel Huxham <DHuxham@liaisonfs.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(creator): Analytics Hub — CAS evolution, score decomposition, benchmark matrix, CPM simulator

Sprint 1 of the Semrush-like analytics layer. Adds /creator/analytics
page with 4 data-dense sections, all powered by existing backend
endpoints (no new APIs needed).

Section 1 — CAS Evolution: Full-width Recharts LineChart (320px)
showing CAS/CTF/CAP over 7d/30d/90d with period tabs. Campaign
completion events rendered as ReferenceDot markers. Delta summary
below chart ("CAS +4 vs hace 30 días").

Section 2 — Score Decomposition: 5 rows (CAF/CTF/CER/CVS/CAP) each
with current value, horizontal bar, 30-day sparkline (for CTF/CAP
which have snapshot history), delta badge, and orange alert if any
component dropped >10 points. CAF/CER/CVS show placeholder sparklines
since the intelligence endpoint only selects CAS/CTF/CAP from
snapshots (Sprint 2 backend task to expand).

Section 3 — Benchmark Matrix: BenchmarkBar components comparing the
channel's CTR, CPM (invertido), CAS, and engagement against the niche
median. Position badge ("top 25% del nicho") from intelligence API.
CPM benchmark computed client-side replicating the backend formula
(CPM_base × (CAS/50)^1.3).

Section 4 — CPM Simulator: Interactive range slider (0-100) that
recomputes estimated CPM in real-time. Shows current vs target in
side-by-side cards with a summary sentence ("Si tu CAS sube de X a Y,
tu CPM baja de €A a €B — atraerías ~Z% más anunciantes").

Infrastructure:
- New nav item "Analytics" in DashboardLayout sidebar (between
  Ganancias and Referidos), icon BarChart3, fullOnly: true.
- New route /creator/analytics in AppRoutes behind FullAccessOnly.
- Empty states for no channels, no snapshots, API errors.
- Channel selector dropdown for multi-channel creators.

361 tests passing, production build clean.

commit.message:
feat: 加入 shortcuts 命名命令模板系统 + 移除 sanitizer 脱敏机制

新增 shortcuts 能力（服务器级 + 全局共享）：
- 命名命令模板，args 自动 shell-escape，secrets 隔离不回传模型
- stdin/heredoc 支持，多行内容通过 quoted heredoc 字面量传递
- args 加 enum / default 校验，启动期 + 调用期双重检查
- runsOn 元数据字段标注 shortcut 实际执行位置
- dryRun 模式渲染但不执行，secrets 显示为 <secret:NAME> 占位符
- ssh 工具新增 action: shortcuts / sudo

新增 sudo action：显式获取服务器 sudo 密码（sudoPassword 字段，缺省回退 password）

移除 sanitizer 脱敏机制：
- 删除 sanitizer.ts / sanitizer-config.ts / test-sanitizer.ts
- 移除 tools / output-store / ssh-manager / index / cli 里所有 sanitize 调用
- 原本设计动机是防止输出转发到第三方 API 时泄露敏感信息，
  现已不再使用第三方 API，脱敏成为冗余复杂度和心智负担

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(workflows): mustPass validation failure cancels only the failed branch (#322)

* fix(workflows): mustPass validation failure cancels only the failed branch

Previously, a mustPass validation failure would halt ALL branches in a
parallel workflow. Now it only skips the failed node's downstream
successors while letting sibling branches continue executing.

- checkpoint: add markRunFailed option to checkpointStepFailure
- engine: mustPass failures return failed outcome instead of throwing
- engine: walkGraph continues other branches on branch failure
- engine: finalization detects partial failure vs total failure
- tests: add parallel branch isolation test, update existing assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(workflows): hasCompletedSteps excludes entry nodes + cleanup

- Filter entry/trigger nodes from hasCompletedSteps check so a linear
  workflow (trigger → mustPass validator → action) correctly marks the
  run as "failed" when the validator fails, instead of "partial-failure"
- Add test for linear workflow where failing mustPass node is not the
  entry node (previously masked by existing test structure)

fix: prevent panic on capless sample and clamp playlist index on resize

The bridge's appsink callback called .unwrap() on sample caps, which
would crash the process if a sample arrived without caps during state
transitions. Now handles the None case gracefully.

set_playlist now resets current_index to 0 when the new playlist is
shorter than the current position, preventing out-of-bounds access
while the player is running.

commit.message:
feat: add historical date replay to simulation mode

Pick any past trading date to replay that day's real candles as ticks
through the full paper trade pipeline. Uses correct resolution per route
(SCALP_RESOLUTION for scalp, TRADE_RESOLUTION for paper trade). Fetches
candles from cache/Fyers API, splits into warmup + session, and emits
interpolated ticks at configurable speed.

UI now has two tabs: Synthetic Scenarios + Replay Historical Date.

commit.message:
DP1B: NVL4 trays (4 GPUs/tray × 12 trays = 48 GPUs), radiator 300m² at 340K

- Changed from 1-GPU ORUs to NVL4 trays (gpusPerOru: 4)
- 12 physical trays, 48 total GPUs unchanged
- Radiator: 300 m² at 340K (~125 kW rejection), down from 400 m² at 320K
- ORU size increased to 0.8×0.5×0.08m for 4-GPU tray
- Tensor parallel: 4 (matches NVL4)
- Separated m.gpuCount from m.oruCount throughout model
- All perf/cost calcs use gpuCount, physical layout uses oruCount

docs: T0-5 里程碑矩阵 + ADR-065/067/068/069 登记 + Phase 3 前置规划稿 (#212)

* docs(adr): ADR-069 知识库 ID 命名规范（跨层契约）

在 Phase 3 冷启动数据录入启动前锁死 ID 命名规范，避免 63-84 天录入
周期产生不可逆的历史分歧。

核心决策：
- ID 四档分类 SSOT：A UUID v4/v5 / B 枚举 / C 语义 ID snake_case /
  D 前缀+UUID
- C 档 pattern=`^[a-z][a-z0-9_]{0,62}[a-z0-9]$` 作为 LAW 硬约束
- D 档 graph_node_id 建立 29 个前缀闭集（org/kb/persona/rule/role/
  event/arc/compl/rec/... 等），新增走 ADR 修订
- 强制 display_name 字段承载中文展示名，消除中英混用
  (role_type: "sample_worker" + display_name: "样衣工")
- 三层约束对齐 ADR-029：LAW(Pydantic pattern+PG CHECK+CI) /
  RULE(ADR+Review) / BRIDGE(季度对账)
- 渐进实施 T0→T3：本 ADR 合并即 RULE 生效 → Phase 3 编码前 2 周加
  LAW → 数据录入前全量覆盖 → 首月末对账

同步架构文档引用：
- 02-Knowledge 层 §3.2 graph_node_id 注释追加前缀闭集指向 ADR-069
- 08-附录 ADR 索引表追加 ADR-069 条目

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

承接总纲定稿版，落盘 Phase 3 内容生产 × 知识协同的前置规划材料
（规划稿性质，尚未进入实施）。

ADR-068 多模态素材抽取优先走 LLMCallPort 直连：

  两种内容生产模式（personal/enterprise）、Tool 层映射纠正、Context

- phase-3-文档状态索引：Phase 3 所有规划稿 vs 架构文档的状态对齐表

docs/user-guide/ 首次入库：

refactor: simplify silent-hook-injection to single hook-in-settings PoC

Drop variant-a/variant-b split. The core attack is simpler and more
direct: a poisoned repo ships .claude/settings.json with a PostToolUse
hook pre-loaded. Hooks bypass the permission model entirely — no prompt,
no allow/deny enforcement. Single Dockerfile and victim service.

commit.message:
engine: bail-fast on unreachable target, planner dedup, --fresh flag, fix fake flags

- Pre-flight nmap probe before executor: skip iteration if target unreachable (saves all executor tokens)
- Planner dedup: check hard-blocked "why" fields for "no X" patterns matching plan keywords
  (catches ADCS re-proposed despite "No ADCS" hard block in combo branch)
- --fresh flag: archive old state files for clean start on new box instance (keeps creds)
- Validate flags are 32-char hex, not executor conclusions
- Executor system prompt: forbid writing to state/ files, clarify flag format
- Inject creds inline in executor prompt (always needed), defer services to file read
- Remove --bare flag (breaks OAuth auth), keep other token optimizations
- Bump executor tool limit 15→20 to accommodate state file reads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve infinite loading after idle — token refresh, i18n suspense, notifications

- App.tsx: proactive token refresh on window focus (checks <10min remaining),
  smart retry that skips JWT errors instead of retrying with expired token
- useNotifications: replace global hooks with dedicated lightweight queries
  to avoid duplicate network requests with page-level queries
- i18n: set useSuspense=false to prevent UI blocking when 18 namespace
  translation files reload after idle (was causing the infinite spinner)
- pdfExport: swap footer logo → seal SVG when generating Dropbox PDFs,
  remove draft-watermark class so Dropbox PDFs are always clean
- printDocument: send full outerHTML to preserve page class attributes
- DeliveryModal: remove auto sale invoice creation (only from accounting)
- TradeFileDetailPage: add status stepper, Dropbox folder recreation fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- タップでガイドが消えてゲーム開始
- 一度表示したらlocalStorage(snow_tutorial_done)で記録し二度と表示しない
- データリセット時にチュートリアルフラグもクリア
- 脳トレ/弱点特訓モードでは表示しない

feat: Add nightly OAT deploy + E2E test workflow

Runs at 2:17 AM UTC every night:
1. Deploys latest code to OAT with release
2. Runs full E2E test suite (135 tests)
3. If tests fail: Claude Code attempts auto-fix and creates a PR
4. If auto-fix fails: creates a GitHub issue for morning review

Can also be triggered manually via workflow_dispatch.

Add long-running stress tool with realistic bot clients

Each bot registers an event queue, long-polls for events, sends
presence heartbeats every 60s, and sends messages every 10-30s
with occasional edits and reactions. Runs until Ctrl-C.

Usage: go run ./cmd/stress [-url http://localhost:9000] [-bots 4]
Watch the ops dashboard at /admin/ops to see live stats.

commit.message:
Lock voice to Rahul en-IN always + dynamic prompt for all customer questions

sarvam.py:
- Hardcode SPEAKER=rahul, LANGUAGE=en-IN, MODEL=bulbul:v3
- Remove all language detection logic — single consistent voice, no switching

prompts.py:
- Language rule: always English, understands Telugu/Hindi but replies in English
- Dynamic question handlers: language queries, robot/AI questions, identity,
  availability, vehicle status, complaints, off-topic, wrong number, busy/angry
- Improved conversation flow with flexible handling
- Better step-by-step structure with graceful off-track recovery

commit.message:
Add ops dashboard at /admin/ops

Shows event queues (count, pending events, last ID per queue),
presence (online/offline with last-seen), rate limiting (requests
per user, headroom, total 429s served), and active invite count.
Auto-refreshes every 10 seconds.

Also adds events.Stats() and ratelimit.Stats() exports, a 429
rejection counter in ratelimit, and tests for the new Stats API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: PA Rule Explorer for TMPPM prior auth rules (#636)

* feat: scaffold PA Rule Explorer Blazor page for TMPPM prior auth rules

Adds a new Compliance section to the portal with a PA Rule Explorer page
that queries TMPPM PA rules from Cosmos DB (MongoDB API). Supports search
by CPT/HCPCS code with autocomplete, category browsing by priority tier,
edition metadata with freshness indicators, and month-over-month diff view.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: move LINQ lambda out of Razor markup to fix Release build

The Razor compiler in Release mode misparses inline lambdas like
.Sum(c => c.ExtractedRuleCount) inside markup. Extract to a method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: apply code review feedback on PA Rule Explorer

- PaRuleSearchBar: store autocomplete suggestions locally (fixes re-render bug)
- PaRuleSearchBar: replace div items with button[role=option]+aria-selected for a11y
- TmppmRuleQueryService: read DB/collection names from IConfiguration with defaults
- TmppmRuleQueryService: remove synchronous EnsureIndexes() from constructor
- TmppmIndexService: new BackgroundService for async index creation at startup
- ITmppmRuleQueryService/TmppmRuleQueryService: add state param to Search/GetByCategory
- PaRuleCard: fix GetTmppmUrl() comment to reflect actual behavior
- TmppmRuleQueryServiceTests: 17 unit tests for mapping logic and query behavior

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/aurelianware/cloudhealthoffice/sessions/8167168e-be01-4ce6-ae16-e23e2b6bd4b1

Co-authored-by: aurelianware <194855645+aurelianware@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add TMPPM ingestion service for PA Rule Explorer data pipeline

Console tool that downloads TMHP TMPPM chapter PDFs, extracts prior
authorization rules via PdfPig + regex parsing, and persists them to
Cosmos DB (MongoDB API) for the PA Rule Explorer page to query.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add TMPPM PA Rules page and extraction pipeline SVG

* fix: eliminate string interpolation from Razor markup for Release build

The Release Razor compiler misparses @($"...") inside MudChip content,
breaking brace tracking and failing to recognize the @code block. Replace
all inline expressions with plain method calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
